title: Interstellar
overview: A team of explorers travels through a wormhole to search for a new home for humanity as Earth collapses.

title: Inception
overview: A skilled thief enters dreams to steal ideas but is offered redemption through an impossible inception mission.

title: Tenet
overview: A covert operative manipulates time inversion to prevent global catastrophe and confronts paradoxical warfare.

title: Oppenheimer
overview: The story of J. Robert Oppenheimer and the moral consequences of building the first atomic bomb.

title: Arrival
overview: A linguist works with the military to communicate with alien visitors and reshape humanity's perception of time.

title: Blade Runner 2049
overview: A new blade runner uncovers a secret that forces him to track down former blade runner Rick Deckard.

title: Dune
overview: Paul Atreides joins the Fremen and embraces a dangerous destiny on the desert planet Arrakis.

title: Dune: Part Two
overview: Paul unites with Chani and the Fremen to wage war while wrestling with prophecy and political power.

title: Sicario
overview: An FBI agent is pulled into a morally ambiguous operation against a violent drug cartel.

title: Prisoners
overview: After two girls disappear, a desperate father and a detective are pushed toward obsession and violence.

title: The Martian
overview: An astronaut stranded on Mars uses science and grit to survive while Earth plans a rescue.

title: Annihilation
overview: A biologist enters a mysterious zone where the laws of nature are mutating into unsettling forms.

title: Ex Machina
overview: A programmer evaluates a humanoid AI and discovers manipulation, desire, and control.

title: Get Out
overview: A young man uncovers disturbing truths when visiting his girlfriend's family estate.

title: Nope
overview: Two siblings investigate a terrifying airborne phenomenon above their family ranch.

title: Parasite
overview: A poor family infiltrates a wealthy household through deception, leading to escalating social conflict.

title: Gone Girl
overview: A husband's life unravels when his wife vanishes and media scrutiny turns him into the prime suspect.

title: Shutter Island
overview: A U.S. Marshal investigates a psychiatric facility and confronts a maze of trauma and delusion.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
overview: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, Max and Furiosa race across the desert to escape a tyrant.

title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
overview: A laundromat owner is drawn into a multiverse conflict while reconciling family and identity.

title: Knives Out
overview: A detective untangles lies and family tensions after a wealthy novelist dies under suspicious circumstances.

title: The Batman
overview: Batman confronts a serial killer whose clues expose corruption in Gotham's elite.
